excerpt: The official programme page for MA/PgD in Chinese Language and Literature lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/72017-llf-llp-pdp Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: Please note that all fields in the application forms should be filled. We will not consider applications that do not provide details of academic qualifications.
